tagline: Yesterday's good news, bright and early.

stories.headline: Neighbors become friends when couple opens their porch to stranger in need
stories.summary: A heartfelt Facebook request transformed strangers into close friends, turning spring afternoons into cherished moments of genuine community.

stories.headline: New pill nearly doubles survival time for advanced pancreatic cancer patients
stories.summary: A breakthrough drug offers patients with advanced pancreatic cancer significantly extended survival and better quality of life—the first major improvement in decades.

stories.headline: Restored Venice wetlands welcome record numbers of wintering flamingos
stories.summary: Nearly 24,000 elegant flamingos now thrive in recovering salt marshes, proving that habitat restoration can bring wildlife roaring back.

stories.headline: Japan welcomes crested ibises to wild for first time in 56 years
stories.summary: Eight elegant birds return to Japan's main island after more than half a century, a triumph of international breeding and habitat restoration.

stories.headline: Single gene therapy infusion cuts harmful cholesterol by up to 62%
stories.summary: London patients receive a pioneering gene therapy that cuts harmful cholesterol by up to 62% with one infusion, potentially freeing millions from daily medications like statins.

stories.headline: Brooklyn community rebuilds beloved free-food fridge with volunteer hearts
stories.summary: Neighbors restore their cherished community fridge with architect care and willing hands, rekindling bonds through daily acts of neighborhood generosity.

stories.headline: Gentle Dalmatian provides quiet comfort to traumatized firefighters
stories.summary: Halligan, a Dalmatian still in training, sensed distress among over 100 traumatized firefighters at a lumber mill explosion and refused breaks, staying close to those who needed her most.

stories.headline: Curlew once declined by 98% returns to breed in Ireland with eggs
stories.summary: A headstarted curlew from 2024 has returned to nest with eggs in Ireland, marking a hopeful milestone for a species that declined by 98% since the 1980s.

stories.headline: Twenty-year-old Sam O'Reilly achieves rare triple crown in single season
stories.summary: Twenty-year-old Sam O'Reilly joins an elite club of just four players ever to win league MVP, playoff MVP, and championship MVP in a single season.

stories.headline: Trail cameras reveal thriving population of Africa's rarest antelope
stories.summary: Trail cameras reveal mountain bongos thriving in Kenya's Maasai Mau forest, roughly 200km from where conservationists thought the species had vanished.

stories.headline: AI supercomputer slashes drug screening from years to seconds
stories.summary: China's GalaxyVS platform screens drug compounds a million times faster than the previous world record, cutting initial screening from years down to tens of seconds.

stories.headline: Virat Kohli's masterclass delivers back-to-back IPL title for RCB
stories.summary: Virat Kohli's masterclass—including a spectacular sequence of 4, 4, 6, 4 against a premier fast bowler—delivers back-to-back IPL titles for RCB with 12 balls to spare.
